에스겔 1:1.content: Now in the thirtieth year, in the fourth month, in the fifth day of the month, as I was among the captives by the river Chebar, the heavens were opened, and I saw visions of God.

에스겔 1:2.content: In the fifth of the month, which was the fifth year of king Jehoiachin’s captivity,

에스겔 1:3.content: Yahweh’s word came to Ezekiel the priest, the son of Buzi, in the land of the Chaldeans by the river Chebar; and Yahweh’s hand was there on him.

에스겔 1:4.content: I looked, and behold, a stormy wind came out of the north: a great cloud, with flashing lightning, and a brightness around it, and out of the middle of it as it were glowing metal, out of the middle of the fire.

에스겔 1:5.content: Out of its center came the likeness of four living creatures. This was their appearance: They had the likeness of a man.

에스겔 1:6.content: Everyone had four faces, and each one of them had four wings.

에스겔 1:7.content: Their feet were straight feet. The sole of their feet was like the sole of a calf’s foot; and they sparkled like burnished bronze.

에스겔 1:8.content: They had the hands of a man under their wings on their four sides. The four of them had their faces and their wings like this:

에스겔 1:9.content: Their wings were joined to one another. They didn’t turn when they went. Each one went straight forward.

에스겔 1:10.content: As for the likeness of their faces, they had the face of a man. The four of them had the face of a lion on the right side. The four of them had the face of an ox on the left side. The four of them also had the face of an eagle.

에스겔 1:11.content: Such were their faces. Their wings were spread out above. Two wings of each one touched another, and two covered their bodies.

에스겔 1:12.content: Each one went straight forward: where the spirit was to go, they went. They didn’t turn when they went.

에스겔 1:13.content: As for the likeness of the living creatures, their appearance was like burning coals of fire, like the appearance of torches. The fire went up and down among the living creatures. The fire was bright, and lightning went out of the fire.

에스겔 1:14.content: The living creatures ran and returned as the appearance of a flash of lightning.

에스겔 1:15.content: Now as I saw the living creatures, behold, there was one wheel on the earth beside the living creatures, for each of the four faces of it.

에스겔 1:16.content: The appearance of the wheels and their work was like a beryl. The four of them had one likeness. Their appearance and their work was as it were a wheel within a wheel.

에스겔 1:17.content: When they went, they went in their four directions. They didn’t turn when they went.

에스겔 1:18.content: As for their rims, they were high and dreadful; and the four of them had their rims full of eyes all around.

에스겔 1:19.content: When the living creatures went, the wheels went beside them. When the living creatures were lifted up from the earth, the wheels were lifted up.

에스겔 1:20.content: Wherever the spirit was to go, they went. The spirit was to go there. The wheels were lifted up beside them; for the spirit of the living creature was in the wheels.

에스겔 1:21.content: When those went, these went. When those stood, these stood. When those were lifted up from the earth, the wheels were lifted up beside them; for the spirit of the living creature was in the wheels.

에스겔 1:22.content: Over the head of the living creature there was the likeness of an expanse, like an awesome crystal to look at, stretched out over their heads above.

에스겔 1:23.content: Under the expanse, their wings were straight, one toward the other. Each one had two which covered on this side, and each one had two which covered their bodies on that side.

에스겔 1:24.content: When they went, I heard the noise of their wings like the noise of great waters, like the voice of the Almighty, a noise of tumult like the noise of an army. When they stood, they let down their wings.

에스겔 1:25.content: There was a voice above the expanse that was over their heads. When they stood, they let down their wings.

에스겔 1:26.content: Above the expanse that was over their heads was the likeness of a throne, as the appearance of a sapphire stone. On the likeness of the throne was a likeness as the appearance of a man on it above.

에스겔 1:27.content: I saw as it were glowing metal, as the appearance of fire within it all around, from the appearance of his waist and upward; and from the appearance of his waist and downward I saw as it were the appearance of fire, and there was brightness around him.

에스겔 1:28.content: As the appearance of the rainbow that is in the cloud in the day of rain, so was the appearance of the brightness all around. This was the appearance of the likeness of Yahweh’s glory. When I saw it, I fell on my face, and I heard a voice of one that spoke.
